services.deepCleansingDesc: Wall, ceiling, skirting board and interior finish painting. Surface preparation and premium paint application.

services.hairRemovalDesc: Office, shop, restaurant and commercial space painting. Flexible hours to avoid business disruption.

services.bodyTreatmentsDesc: Decorative effects, textures, murals and special finishes to give your space personality.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Our clients' opinions are our greatest pride and motivation.

client1.name: Grace C145
client1.text: What a wonderful service this lovely couple offer. We needed 3 large cream rugs and a cream sofa cleaned and the difference before and after was amazing!

client2.name: Max Curtis
client2.text: We inherited a lovely sofa, but in very bad cosmetic condition at our rental place. These guys are amazing and the sofa is looking brand new!

client3.name: Katarína Kondelová
client3.text: Excellent service and great communication :) Immediately after contacting them they came to pick up our rug and brought it beautifully cleaned after a couple of days. Very satisfied :)

client4.name: Carmen Lourenco
client4.text: Excellent service! Always very friendly. This is the second time I've hired this company, first for sofa cleaning and now for mattress cleaning.

faq.title: Got Questions? We've Got Answers
faq.description: We've gathered the most common questions from our clients about our painting services in Montijo.
faq.q1: How long does it take to paint a room?
faq.a1: It depends on the size and condition of the walls. On average, a standard room takes 1-2 days, including surface preparation, primer and two coats of paint.
faq.a2: Yes! We provide free, no-obligation quotes in Montijo and surrounding areas. Just contact us with the job details and we'll respond quickly with a price.
faq.a3: We use paints from recognized brands like Robbialac, CIN and Dyrup, ensuring durability, good finish and low odour.
faq.q4: Do I need to leave home during painting?
faq.a4: Not necessarily. We protect all furniture and flooring. We recommend good ventilation during and after painting to dissipate odours.
faq.q5: Do you do exterior and facade painting?
faq.a5: Yes! We carry out exterior painting with facade-specific, weather-resistant paints. We include crack treatment and waterproofing.
faq.q6: Do you serve condominiums and businesses in Montijo?
faq.a6: Yes! We provide services for individuals, condominiums, offices, shops and commercial spaces in Montijo, Alcochete, Moita and surrounding areas. We offer special rates for large areas.

servicePage.interiorLong: PintaJá offers complete interior painting services in Montijo and surrounding areas. Our certified painters handle walls, ceilings, skirting boards and all interior finishes. We use premium paints from top brands to ensure perfect, lasting results. Each project includes careful surface preparation, furniture protection, primer application and two or more coats as needed.
servicePage.interiorBenefit2: Full protection of furniture and floors
servicePage.interiorFaq1Q: How much does it cost to paint a room in Montijo?
servicePage.interiorFaq1A: The price depends on the area, wall condition and type of paint. Contact us for a free, personalized quote for your project in Montijo.
servicePage.interiorFaq2Q: How long does it take to paint an apartment?
servicePage.interiorFaq2A: A 2-bedroom apartment takes on average 3-5 days, including preparation and finishing. We work efficiently without compromising quality.
servicePage.exteriorLong: Specialized in exterior painting in Montijo, PintaJá transforms facades, balconies and exteriors with high-durability, weather-resistant paints. We perform complete exterior surface treatment, including pressure washing, crack repair, waterproof primer application and painting with exterior-specific paints.
servicePage.exteriorFaq1Q: What paints do you use for exteriors in Montijo?
servicePage.exteriorFaq1A: We use exterior-specific paints from brands like CIN and Robbialac, with UV protection and rain resistance, ensuring 8-10 years of durability.
servicePage.exteriorFaq2Q: Do you paint buildings and condominiums?
servicePage.exteriorFaq2A: Yes! We paint building facades and condominiums in Montijo, Alcochete, Moita and surrounding areas. We offer special rates for large areas.
servicePage.comercialLong: PintaJá provides commercial painting services in Montijo for offices, shops, restaurants, clinics and all types of commercial spaces. We work flexible hours, including weekends and evenings, to minimize impact on your business.
servicePage.comercialFaq1Q: Can you paint outside business hours?
servicePage.comercialFaq1A: Yes! We offer painting during flexible hours — evenings, weekends and holidays — to avoid interfering with your business in Montijo.
servicePage.comercialFaq2Q: Do you quote for large commercial spaces?
servicePage.comercialFaq2A: Absolutely! We have special rates for offices, warehouses and large commercial spaces in Montijo and surrounding areas.
servicePage.preparacaoLong: Before any quality painting, proper surface preparation is essential. PintaJá in Montijo offers complete preparation and repair: crack treatment, damp and mould removal, old paint scraping, filler application and appropriate primers for each surface.
servicePage.preparacaoBenefit4: Primers suited to each wall type
servicePage.preparacaoFaq1Q: Is wall treatment necessary before painting?
servicePage.preparacaoFaq1A: Yes, it's essential! Good preparation ensures paint adheres properly and the final result lasts. We treat cracks, damp and imperfections before painting.
servicePage.preparacaoFaq2Q: Do you treat damp problems in Montijo?
servicePage.preparacaoFaq2A: Yes! We identify the source of damp and apply specific treatments before painting, ensuring the problem doesn't return.
servicePage.decorativaLong: Transform your space in Montijo with professional decorative painting from PintaJá. We offer a wide range of decorative effects: Venetian plaster, concrete effect, textures, custom murals, feature walls and metallic or pearlescent finishes.
servicePage.decorativaFaq1Q: What types of decorative effects do you offer?
servicePage.decorativaFaq1A: We do Venetian plaster, concrete effect, various textures, metallic finishes, feature walls and custom murals in Montijo and surrounding areas.
servicePage.decorativaFaq2Q: Do you help choose the right colours?
servicePage.decorativaFaq2A: Yes! We offer free colour consultation, helping you choose the ideal colours and effects for each room in your space.
servicePage.tetosLong: PintaJá specializes in ceiling painting in Montijo and surrounding areas. We know ceilings are one of the hardest surfaces to paint, requiring technique and experience for a perfect result. Our team uses professional equipment and proper techniques for uniform coverage.
servicePage.tetosBenefit2: Stain and crack treatment on ceilings
servicePage.tetosFaq1Q: Does the ceiling need preparation before painting?
servicePage.tetosFaq1A: Yes! We treat cracks, damp stains and irregularities. We apply appropriate primer to ensure adhesion and perfect coverage.
servicePage.tetosFaq2Q: What paint do you use for ceilings?
servicePage.tetosFaq2A: We use specific matt ceiling paints, with high coverage and low splatter, from CIN and Robbialac brands, for a perfect finish.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoLong: PintaJá offers professional waterproofing services in Montijo to protect your property from damp and leaks. We treat interior and exterior walls, facades, basements, terraces and roofs with high-quality waterproofing products.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq1Q: How do you detect the source of leaks?
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq1A: We perform a complete diagnosis to identify the source of damp — whether from infiltration, condensation or capillarity — before applying the appropriate treatment.
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq2Q: Does waterproofing work for exteriors and interiors?
servicePage.impermeabilizacaoFaq2A: Yes! We waterproof interior walls, exteriors, facades, basements and terraces in Montijo and surrounding areas, with solutions suited to each situation.
